sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n115779" key="yixa/rpac" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ψῑχ-άρπαξ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ᾰγος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ψίξ</etym>) <sense id="n115779.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Crumb-yilcher,</tr_> name of a mouse in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1220.tlg001:105" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Batr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">105</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
